description: Create target. Must reference existing Connection.
tips: Must reference a valid connection/connector target. Use dry_run first.

description: Delete an activation target.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get target details.
List activation targets.
Update target.
tips: Use dry_run first; activation target changes can affect downstream delivery.

description: Create activation. Requires active segment + target.
tips: Requires an active segment and a valid activation target. Use dry_run first.

description: Delete activation.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get activation details.
List activations with optional pagination.
List activations.
Update activation.
tips: Use dry_run first; updating activations can affect downstream delivery.

description: Create target.
tips: Data action targets are for event-triggered payloads, not segment activation targets. Use dry_run first.

description: Delete target.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get target details.
List action targets.
Update target.
tips: Use dry_run first; endpoint, credential, or payload changes can affect event delivery.

description: Create action. Must have target configured.
tips: Create or verify a data action target first. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Delete a data action.
tips: Delete the data action before deleting its data action target. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get action details.
List data actions.
List Data 360 data actions.
List engagement signals for a data graph. Required for recommender attribution setup.
Create experience config.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete experience config.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get specific experience config.
List experience configs for a data connector.
Update experience config.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Generate mobile live preview link.
tips: Use dry_run first; mobile preview link creation is treated as confirmed until verified as ephemeral.

description: Get org info (Data Cloud TSE endpoint).
Create personalization point.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete personalization point.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get specific personalization point.
Update personalization point.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create personalization schema.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete personalization schema.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get specific personalization schema.
Update personalization schema.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create transformer.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete transformer.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get specific transformer.
List transformers with filtering.
Update transformer.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Clear one or all in-memory Data Cloud ingest auth sessions.
Exchange a PKCE Salesforce authorization code for Data Cloud tenant token metadata without returning tokens.
Start a PKCE authorization flow for Data Cloud ingest auth and keep the code verifier in memory only.
Plan a headless-safe Data Cloud tenant ingest auth setup path without persisting credentials.
List in-memory Data Cloud ingest auth sessions without tokens.
Inspect whether Data Cloud tenant ingest auth is configured for Ingestion API jobs.
Create a Snowflake connection with KeyPair auth. Provide private key content directly.
tips: Provide private key content only at execution time. Test first when possible, then dry_run before execution.

description: List pre-configured connection endpoints.
Validate connection before saving. Does NOT create.
tips: Pass connectorType as a query param and connector parameters/credentials in the body; this does not create a connection.

description: Create connection. connectorType REQUIRED. Test first.
tips: Run d360_connection_test first with the same connectorType/body. Use dry_run before execution.

description: List database schemas available in a connection (e.g., Snowflake schemas). Pass database name in advancedAttributes.
tips: Read-only schema discovery POST. Pass connector-specific request fields in body.

description: Delete connection. Breaks dependent streams.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get connection details. connectorType REQUIRED.
List connections. connectorType REQUIRED.
Describe field-level schema (names, types, primary keys) of an object in a connection.
tips: Read-only source field discovery POST. Use connection.objects.list first to verify resourceName.

description: List objects/tables available in a connection. Use database/schema in advancedAttributes for DB connections.
tips: Read-only source object discovery POST. Scope database connectors with body.advancedAttributes when available.

description: Update connection. Can break dependent streams.
tips: Use dry_run first; connection changes can break dependent data streams, activation targets, and data actions.

description: List Salesforce CRM connections.
Discover supported connector types.
Get required/optional fields for connector type.
List connector catalog entries supported by the org.
List Data 360 connections for a connector type. Use connectorType=SNOWFLAKE for Snowflake.
tips: Use connectorType=SNOWFLAKE to list Snowflake connections.

description: Get the registered schema for an Ingestion API source connection.
Upload or replace the registered schema for an Ingestion API source connection.
tips: Run source_schema.test first. Mutates the source schema used by future stream creation.

description: Validate an Ingestion API source schema payload before upload.
tips: Schema object names and labels must be API-safe. Use this before source_schema.put.

description: List Ingestion API source connections.
Add field mappings to an existing object mapping.
tips: Call d360_dmo_mapping_get first, then add only verified source/target field names. Use dry_run first.

description: Delete a single field mapping.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Create a single DLO-to-DMO mapping.
tips: Call d360_dlo_get and d360_dmo_get first to verify exact source/target field API names and types. Use dry_run first.

description: Delete mapping.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get mapping configuration.
List mappings by DMO name or CRM source.
Update a DLO-to-DMO mapping by developer name.
tips: Use dry_run first; mapping changes affect future ingestion into the target DMO.

description: Create DMO. API name must end with __dlm.
tips: Do not include the __dlm suffix in body.name. Include at least one primary key field; Engagement DMOs require eventDateTimeFieldName. Use dry_run first.

description: Delete DMO. Cascades to dependent objects.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get full DMO schema including all fields.
List all Data Model Objects. Filter by category.
Update DMO. Partial updates supported.
tips: Use dry_run first; DMO changes can affect mappings, calculated insights, segments, and downstream activations.

description: Show mutable vs immutable date field scores.
tips: Local helper. Prefer immutable event/created date fields over modified/updated fields.

description: List identity resolution rulesets.
Update ruleset.
tips: Full replacement is higher blast radius than PATCH. Compare against d360_ir_get output and dry_run before execution.

description: Create ruleset. Rules execute in priority order.
tips: Verify source DMOs, matching fields, match methods, and reconciliation rules first. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Delete ruleset.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get ruleset details.
List identity resolution rulesets.
tips: Use this to discover ruleset ids before update, publish, or run operations.

description: Publish ruleset.
tips: Publish activates the ruleset configuration. Review matching/reconciliation rules and dry_run first.

description: Execute ruleset.
tips: Manual runs can consume compute and update unified profiles. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Update ruleset. Changes apply after republish.
tips: Use dry_run first; changes apply after publish and can affect unified profiles.

description: Dry-run field matching with confidence scores.
tips: Local helper. Use before smart mapping suggest to inspect confidence and unmatched fields.

description: Auto-select immutable event date for Engagement streams.
tips: Local helper. Review enhancedBody, then dry-run d360_datastream_create.

description: Auto-generate field mappings using similarity.
tips: Local helper. Review mappingPayload, then dry-run d360_dmo_mapping_create.

description: Create ALL standard mappings for a source object in one call.
tips: Review standard mapping preview output or verified DLO/DMO field details first. The REST facade sends the reviewed mapping payload; upstream MCP local bulk lookup is not embedded here. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Preview standard DLO-to-DMO mappings from 500+ definitions.
tips: Local helper. Preview standard mappings first, then dry-run d360_standard_mapping_create with a reviewed payload.

description: Find recent Agentforce STDM sessions by optional agent API name and time window.
Export one recent Agentforce session as pre-joined OpenTelemetry JSON.
Fetch an STDM conversation timeline for a session id.
Find recent Agent Platform Tracing ERROR spans.
Join one STDM interaction to messages, steps, and Platform Tracing spans.
Aggregate Platform Tracing duration by operation name.
Fetch and reconstruct a Platform Tracing span tree by trace id.
Plan activation target and activation creation steps without mutation.
Run activation target and activation setup from reviewed payloads.
Plan Agentforce STDM and platform tracing queries for an agent/session investigation.
Run read-only Agentforce STDM and platform tracing investigation actions and summarize findings.
Plan calculated insight and segment creation/publish steps without mutation.
Run calculated insight and segment setup from reviewed payloads.
Discover explicit cleanup candidates by safe prefixes and produce cleanup.plan parameters without deleting anything.
Plan cleanup of explicitly owned Data 360 resources.
Run cleanup of explicitly owned Data 360 resources after confirmation.
Run an interactive localhost PKCE flow for Data Cloud ingest auth and return sanitized in-memory auth session metadata.
Plan Route A local CSV ingestion through Ingestion API source schema, data stream, tenant ingest job, and SQL verification.
Run a single CSV ingestion journey or dry-run its manifest-backed plan.
Route a natural-language Data 360 user utterance to a recommended journey and next action.
Describe one curated Data 360 outcome journey, including phases, inputs, verification, and available actions.
List curated Data 360 outcome journeys that map user intent to tools and actions.
Plan how to connect, land, model, map, and verify new data without mutation.
Run CSV ingestion and return harmonization next steps that make landed data usable.
Plan a multi-file Data 360 CSV ingestion manifest without mutation.
Run a Data 360 CSV ingestion manifest through source schema, streams, jobs, and verification.
Validate a Data 360 CSV ingestion manifest.
Plan semantic model, search index, and retriever setup for RAG or BI-style retrieval without mutation.
Run semantic search-index and retriever setup from reviewed payloads.
Infer an Ingestion API schema from a local CSV file.
Get component dependencies.
Get component deployment status.
List org components available for inclusion in data kits.
Get deployment job status.
Deploy a data kit.
tips: Review the manifest, component dependencies, and target dataspace before deployment. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Get DataKit details.
List available DataKits.
tips: Use this to discover dataKitId values before component, manifest, or deployment-status operations.

description: Get DataKit manifest.
Undeploy components.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: List available DataKits.
Add member to data space.
tips: Verify member names and filter configuration before changing data-space access. Use dry_run before execution.

description: List data space members.
Remove members from a data space (max 10).
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Create isolated workspace.
tips: Data spaces are admin/global workspaces. Confirm naming, membership plan, and downstream references; dry_run before execution.

description: Delete a data space and its contents.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get data space details.
List data spaces.
Update data space.
tips: Use dry_run first; data space metadata is shared by downstream Data 360 assets.

description: Create AWS S3 data stream.
tips: Call d360_connection_list with connectorType=AwsS3 first. Verify file parser attributes, source fields, DLO fields, mappings, and refresh config before execution.

description: Create Salesforce CRM data stream. Auto-populates source fields.
tips: Call d360_connection_list with connectorType=SalesforceDotCom first and use the selected connection alias. Engagement streams require eventDateTimeFieldName.

description: Create Snowflake-backed data stream. Builds sourceFields, mappings, and advancedAttributes (database/schema/object) from field definitions.
tips: Use an existing Snowflake connection. Verify database, schema, object, DLO fields, primary key, mappings, and refresh mode before execution.

description: Create a new DLO.
tips: Data streams usually create DLOs automatically. Verify fields, category, dataspace, and primary key before execution; use dry_run first.

description: Remove DLO.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get DLO fields and metadata.
List all Data Lake Objects.
Update DLO metadata.
tips: Use dry_run first; DLO schema changes can affect data streams, mappings, and search indexes.

description: Close a tenant Ingestion API bulk ingest job by marking upload complete.
Create a tenant Ingestion API bulk ingest job.
Poll tenant Ingestion API bulk ingest job status.
Upload CSV bytes to an open tenant Ingestion API bulk ingest job.
Create data stream. Requires Connection and DMO Mapping.
tips: Prefer connector-specific create operations when possible. Verify the connection, source fields, DLO shape, and mappings first; then dry_run before execution.

description: Create an Ingestion API data stream from a registered source schema object.
tips: Use connectorInfo.connectorType=IngestApi and connectorDetails.events=[schemaObjectName].

description: Create data stream for third-party connectors (Airtable, HubSpot, Marketo, Google Ads, etc). Builds full payload from simple field definitions.
tips: Use connector metadata and source object field discovery first; dry-run the generated stream payload before creation.

description: Delete stream. Does not delete existing data.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get full stream configuration.
List data streams. Filter by category.
List data streams with optional pagination.
Manually trigger ingestion.
tips: Salesforce CRM data streams cannot be manually triggered; use for S3, Snowflake, file upload, and other non-CRM streams. Dry-run first.

description: Update stream. Changes apply to future runs.
tips: Use dry_run first; updates affect future ingestion runs. Avoid sending read-only fields returned by get.

description: Set transform schedule.
tips: Use dry_run first; schedule changes can trigger recurring downstream processing.

description: Get transform schedule.
Create transform. Schedule runs separately.
tips: Validate first with d360_transform_validate, then dry_run the create request before execution.

description: Delete transform.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get transform details.
List data transforms.
List Data 360 SQL/data transforms.
Validate + enrich with output schema. RECOMMENDED before create.
tips: Validate and enrich transform SQL before transform.create; does not create the transform.

description: Execute transform manually.
tips: Manual runs can consume org resources and update transform outputs. Use dry_run first.

description: Update transform.
tips: Use dry_run first; changing a transform can affect generated DLO/DMO data.

description: Quick SQL validation (simple). Use prepare for full validation.
tips: Validation can return precise STL graph issues such as missing target DLOs.

description: List Data 360 data spaces.
Lookup by natural key.
tips: Keep lookups bounded with lookupKeys or limit. Set live=true only when real-time graph lookup is required.

description: List data graph entities or get schema.
Query data graphs. Set live=true for real-time.
Describe one Data Lake Object by API name.
Describe one Data Model Object by API name.
Discover one calculated insight metadata definition.
Discover CI names and available dimensions/measures.
Query calculated insights with dimensions and measures.
List paginated metadata entities. entityType required.
Fetch metadata for a specific entity name.
Get metadata for entity. ALWAYS use entityName filter.
tips: Use entityName or entityType to avoid broad metadata payloads. For compact DMO/DLO discovery, prefer the d360_metadata Pi tool.

description: Search metadata using natural language. Preferred for discovery.
tips: Use for discovery when compact catalogs are not enough. Include a metadataType filter when possible. If the response is PRISM_RUNTIME_ERROR and mentions msr_metadata_index__dlm, the org search plane is unindexed; fall back to d360_metadata_entities or d360_metadata list/describe.

description: Discover profile schema.
Discover one profile DMO schema and relationships.
Query Individual, Account, or custom profile models.
Cancel a running query.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Fetch paginated rows from completed query.
Execute SQL query. Preferred over V1/V2. Supports parameterized queries.
tips: Always bound broad queries with LIMIT or a trace/session/id predicate.

description: Poll for long-running query status.
Build a bounded row-count verification query for a Data Lake Object.
Create CI. apiName must end with __cio. No COUNT(DISTINCT).
tips: Run d360_ci_validate first. apiName must end with __cio.

description: Delete CI. Breaks dependent segments.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Disable CI.
tips: Use dry_run first; disabling a calculated insight can affect dependent segments and activations.

description: Enable CI.
tips: Use dry_run first; enabling a calculated insight can make it available to downstream segments and activations.

description: Get CI details.
List calculated insights.
List all CIs. Check status for ACTIVE.
Execute CI calculation.
tips: Run after validating and creating/enabling the calculated insight. Use dry_run first; execution can consume compute and update downstream results.

description: Get CI run status.
tips: Refreshes and returns calculated insight run status; use after ci.run.

description: Update CI. Triggers recompilation.
tips: Validate changes before update; updates can trigger recompilation.

description: Validate CI before creation.
tips: Validate before creating or updating calculated insights.

description: Create segment. Requires ACTIVE CIs first.
tips: Verify DMO/CI fields first. Prefer dry_run before create. Segment payload shapes can vary by definition type.

description: Deactivate a segment by API name (developer name). Inverse of publish.
tips: Deactivate uses segment API/developer name, not always the internal id.

description: Delete segment by API name (developer name). Irreversible.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get segment by record ID or API name. Check segmentStatus for ACTIVE.
List segments with optional pagination.
List all segments.
Trigger segment calculation.
tips: Publishing can start asynchronous membership calculation. Inspect segment status before and after.

description: Update segment metadata by API name. Cannot change SQL via PATCH.
tips: Use dry_run first; changing a segment can affect downstream activations.

description: Triage an alert: accept (directives auto-apply on next setup-version) or dismiss.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Query training-time and runtime data alerts for a model artifact. Returns alerts with structured directives[] for auto-remediation on retrain.
tips: Read/query-style Machine Learning POST. Inspect inputs and keep result sizes bounded.

description: Activate a configured model (status=Enabled). Required before the model can be deployed.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a configured model wrapping a model artifact. artifact reference is required. Status defaults to Disabled unless explicitly Enabled.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete a configured model.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get a configured model by id or developer name.
Get one configured-model history snapshot.
List history snapshots for a configured model.
List configured models. Filter by assetIdOrName + assetType (ModelArtifact|ModelSetup) to find configured models bound to a specific artifact or setup.
Update a configured model.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete a model artifact. Predictive deletes do not cascade — referencing configured models become orphaned.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get a trained model artifact. Carries the parameters, inputFields, outputFields, source/setupContainer back-links.
List trained model artifacts. Filter by modelType, sourceType, dataCloudOneVisibility.
Update a model artifact (label, description, status, output-field overrides). Status writable values are Enabled/Disabled only.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a model-setup container (parent record). Does not start training; follow up with d360_ml_setup_version_create.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete a model-setup container. Cascades to all versions. Irreversible.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get a model-setup container by id or developer name.
List model-setup containers. Filters: search, modelType, modelCapability, setupType, connectorType. Pagination via limit/offset.
Update a model-setup container (label, description, modelCapability, outcomeDefinition).
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Run synchronous prediction against a configured model — submits raw feature rows and returns per-row Success/Error results with factors, prescriptions, and warnings.
tips: Read/query-style Machine Learning POST. Inspect inputs and keep result sizes bounded.

description: Activate a prediction job definition (sets activationStatus=Active). Required before running.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Generic create — prefer the type-specific tools (regression, binary, multiclass, sentiment, topic, clustering) which pre-shape the payload and validate locally.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a BinaryClassification prediction job definition. showClassProbabilities defaults to true.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a Clustering prediction job definition. clusterIdFieldLabel and clusterLabelFieldLabel are required.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a MulticlassClassification prediction job definition. numberOfClasses ≥ 1, default = all classes.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a Regression prediction job definition. Pre-shapes payload, validates settings ranges (maxTopContributors 0-3, maxPrescriptions 0-3, prescriptionThreshold 0-100).
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a SentimentDetection prediction job definition. Defaults model to sfdc_ai__DefaultSalesforceSentimentAnalysis.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Create a TopicClassification prediction job definition. 2-5 distinct topic labels, each ≤ 100 chars; up to 3 text fields. Defaults model to sfdc_ai__DefaultSalesforceTopicClassification.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Deactivate a prediction job definition (sets activationStatus=Inactive). Inactive defs cannot be run.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Delete a prediction job definition. Irreversible.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get a prediction job definition by id or developer name.
List prediction job definitions. Optional modelId filter.
Update a prediction job definition. Partial-update; for activation toggle prefer the activate/deactivate tools.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: Submit a prediction job for execution. Async — response carries job id and initial status. PREREQUISITE: definition must be Active.
tips: Use dry_run first; running a prediction job can consume compute and requires an active prediction definition.

description: Profile values on a data source — cardinality, null counts, distribution stats. Use to decide which fields are usable as features.
tips: Read/query-style Machine Learning POST. Inspect inputs and keep result sizes bounded.

description: List candidate outcome columns (Binary, Discrete, Continuous, Clustering) the data source can support. Optional predictionType narrows results.
tips: Read/query-style Machine Learning POST. Inspect inputs and keep result sizes bounded.

description: Row count for the data source after filters and joins are applied. Used to gate whether there is enough data to train.
tips: Read/query-style Machine Learning POST. Inspect inputs and keep result sizes bounded.

description: Enumerate fields and applicable transformations for a data source. First call when authoring a model setup.
tips: Read/query-style Machine Learning POST. Inspect inputs and keep result sizes bounded.

description: Create a new EdcNoCode setup version — kicks off training. Algorithm defaulted by outcome type if omitted.
tips: Use dry_run first; creating a setup version can start or prepare model training.

description: Get one setup version with its full setup body. Use to poll status during training.
Training-time inspector metrics for a setup version (AUC, RMSE, confusion matrices, gain table, outcome distribution). gauges defaults to 'Overview'; use 'All' for the full payload.
List versions of a model-setup container.
Update setup version description or status (only mutable fields). Send status='Training' to start training on a Draft version.
tips: Use dry_run first; actual execution requires allow_confirmed=true after reviewing the resolved request.

description: List machine-learning model artifacts, including embedding models required by search indexes.
tips: Search index creation requires an embedding-capable model artifact; chat-completion-only orgs should report readiness as feature gated.

description: Create retriever configuration.
tips: For NoCode configurations, provide input, outputFields, numberOfResults, and isActive. Use dry_run first.

description: Delete retriever configuration.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get retriever configuration.
List retriever configurations.
Update retriever configuration.
tips: At most one configuration can be active within a retriever. Use dry_run first.

description: Create retriever.
tips: Call d360_search_index_list first to find source search indexes. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Delete retriever.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get retriever.
List machine-learning retrievers when retriever APIs are provisioned.
tips: Can return not-found when retriever APIs are not provisioned; do not use as a core readiness gate.

description: List retrievers.
tips: Use this to find retriever API names before create/update/configuration work.

description: Update retriever.
tips: Use dry_run first; updates change retriever metadata used by downstream RAG flows.

description: Get search index configuration.
tips: Call this before creating or updating a search index to discover valid config ids.

description: Create search index.
tips: Call d360_search_index_config first and use its supported config ids. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Delete search index.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get search index details.
List search indexes when the org exposes the search-index surface.
tips: Some orgs expose this surface only after search indexes are provisioned.

description: List search indexes.
Get search index processing history.
tips: The upstream MCP notes offset is 1-based and pagination may be unreliable.

description: Update search index.
tips: Call d360_search_index_config and d360_search_index_get first. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Create calculated dimension. Use [DataObject].[Field] syntax.
tips: Use [DataObject].[Field] formula syntax and dry-run before execution.

description: Delete calculated dimension.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get calculated dimension.
List calculated dimensions.
Update calculated dimension.
tips: Dry-run first and validate formula syntax with supported formula metadata.

description: Create calculated measurement. aggregationType UserAgg required.
tips: Use aggregationType UserAgg for aggregate formulas and dry-run before execution.

description: Delete calculated measurement.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get calculated measurement.
List calculated measurements.
Update calculated measurement.
tips: Dry-run first and verify downstream metrics or semantic queries that reference the measure.

description: Clone semantic model.
tips: Dry-run first and verify the target apiName does not collide with an existing semantic model.

description: Create empty model. Add objects separately. dataspace REQUIRED.
tips: Create the shell first, then add data objects, relationships, calculated fields, and metrics. Use dry_run before execution.

description: Add data object. Type: Dmo, Dlo, or Cio.
tips: Verify the DMO, DLO, or CIO exists first. Use dataObjectType Dmo, Dlo, or Cio. Dry-run before execution.

description: Delete data object. Breaks relationships.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get data object.
List data objects in model.
Update data object.
tips: Use dry_run first; changing a semantic data object can affect dimensions, measurements, relationships, and queries.

description: Delete model and all sub-components.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get model external dependencies.
List dimensions.
Reference available functions for calc dims/measures.
Get semantic model.
Get one semantic data model.
List semantic models.
List semantic data models.
List measurements.
Create named metric for BI tools.
tips: Verify the metric definition JSON and dry-run before execution.

description: Delete metric.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get metric.
List metrics.
Update metric.
tips: Dry-run first; metric changes can affect BI and semantic query consumers.

description: Get SDM permissions.
Query semantic model. Use semanticModelId not apiName.
tips: Keep query limits small and verify semantic model ids and field expressions first.

description: Execute a semantic data model query.
tips: Semantic queries use /semantic-engine/gateway, not /ssot/query-sql.

description: Create relationship. Use semantic field names, not DMO names.
tips: Use semantic field API names from data object list output, not raw DMO field names. Dry-run before execution.

description: Delete relationship. Breaks queries.
tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

description: Get relationship.
List relationships.
Update relationship.
tips: Dry-run first; relationship changes affect joins and semantic query results.

description: Update model metadata only.
tips: Use dry_run first; model metadata changes can affect semantic queries, dashboards, and RAG retrievers.

description: Validate one semantic data model.
Validate model before querying.
tips: Use validation before semantic query or downstream BI/RAG usage.
